title: Lucid Group, Inc. (LCID) Analyst Ratings, Estimates & Forecasts
text: Lucid Group Analyst Expectations and Sentiment. Analyst Sentiment. Among 10 Wall Street analysts tracking Lucid, the consensus rating is Hold—comprised of seven Hold ratings, two Sell ratings, and one Buy rating. The stock sits well below Wall Street's consensus price target of $13.13, which implies over 100% potential upside. Analyst Expectations. Analysts expect $370M revenue, 57% growth. However, the electric vehicle manufacturer has fallen short of earnings expectations in six out of the last nine reporting periods. Profitability Outlook. Analyst projections point to an anticipated loss of $2.35 per share, showing modest improvement compared to the $2.40 loss recorded during the corresponding period. Price Targets. LCID has a consensus Sell rating with an average price target of $9.99 based on 15 analysts' ratings. The highest recent forecast is $30, and the lowest is $1 pre-split. Key Investor Concerns. The company is burning through cash and isn't doing enough to gain meaningful ground against competitors like Tesla and BYD.
